title: Author Signing: Amor Towles
author: Amor Towles
description: Join us at Harvard Book Store for an exclusive book signing event with romantasy/featured author Amor Towles, celebrating their work, including "Table for Two". Copies of the book will be available for purchase, and the author will sign copies. Q&A session to precede signing.

title: Book Discussion: Onyx Storm
author: Rebecca Yarros
description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "Onyx Storm" by Rebecca Yarros. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at Barnes & Noble. Refreshments served.

title: Book Discussion: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "The Hobbit" by J.R.R. Tolkien. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at Fabled Fantasy Events. Refreshments served.

title: Family Storytime: "Divine Rivals"
author: Rebecca Ross
description: Bring the family for an engaging afternoon of reading, crafts, and interactive storytelling featuring "Divine Rivals" by Rebecca Ross. Perfect for readers of all ages. Hosted at Barnes & Noble.

bookTitle: A Deal with the Elf King
